_why: James's Decision B (ERP 0700): the VALUATION basis is ERP's term structure, not the pipeline's own real curve / variance ERP. Applied as a pipeline step so regeneration cannot silently revert it (asfp-bot b701da3 did exactly that).
_auto_latest: ERP 1826 / James: this file holds ONLY paths + the source->target column mapping. It carries NO numbers, so a new vintage needs no edit here - ERP overwrites the two _latest files and the next pipeline run picks them up. Pinned constants were a silent-staleness hole.
